files.description: Top-level repository scope, supported proof surfaces, and user entrypoint.
Canonical design note for the experimental stwo backend, decoding phases, carried-state packaging, and lookup semantics.
Reproducibility requirements for bundles, figures, scripts, toolchains, and reviewable artifact generation.
CodeRabbit review policy for this repository. Relevant when review behavior, path filters, or bot signal quality changes.
Qodo review policy for this repository. Relevant when automatic review triggers, ignore filters, or proof-oriented review instructions change.
Repository-specific Qodo best practices used to reinforce proof-soundness and regression expectations.
Required CI matrix for stable/full/onnx-export/burn-model coverage and ONNX validation workflow.
Current released architecture/complexity paper. Relevant when reviewing README and scope claims.
Next-paper draft describing proof-carrying decoding, carried-state layers, and lookup/KV boundaries. Relevant when reviewing decoding-related claims.
